name: HWR_CERTIFICATN_VL
query: SELECT B.CERTIFICATION_ID , B.SOURCE_ID , B.NAME , B.TITLE , B.COUNTRY , B.STATE , B.ORGANIZATION , B.START_DATE , B.END_DATE , B.CERTIFICATION_LEVEL , B.CERTIFICATION_TYPE , X.PRFL_ID , B.CREATED_BY , B.CREATION_DATE , B.LAST_UPDATED_BY , B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE , B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_CERTIFICATN_B B LEFT JOIN HWR_CERTIFICATN_PRFL_X X ON (B.CERTIFICATION_ID = X.CERTIFICATION_ID AND B.SOURCE_ID = X.SOURCE_ID)
